title: Shelter & Infrastructure
subtitle: Expanding Safe Spaces: Building Better Homes for NTHF Children
tagline: A Safe Home for Every Child
description: Every child deserves a safe, comfortable place to grow, learn, and play. NTHF is actively expanding its dormitory facilities and upgrading recreational infrastructure to give our children the environment they need to thrive. Your support helps us build the spaces that shape futures.

hero.title: Shelter & Infrastructure
hero.heading: Building Safe Spaces, Shaping Futures
hero.overlayText: Every brick laid, every room expanded — a promise to our children that they are loved and valued.

props.title: Expanding Dormitory & Recreational Facilities
props.content: NTHF is currently expanding its dormitory to accommodate more children in need. We are also developing a standard football field and training ground, and installing new playground equipment including a carousel — creating a nurturing environment where children can live, learn, and play safely.

initiatives.title: Dormitory Expansion
initiatives.description: We are expanding our dormitory facilities to provide safe, comfortable, and dignified housing for more children under NTHF care. The expansion includes new sleeping quarters, study areas, and common spaces.

initiatives.title: Standard Football Field & Training Ground
initiatives.description: We are developing a standard football field with quality grass turf and a dedicated training ground, giving our children access to professional-grade facilities for sports, fitness, and teamwork.

initiatives.title: Playground Upgrade — New Carousel Installation
initiatives.description: A new carousel and upgraded playground equipment are being installed to provide younger children with safe, joyful recreational spaces within the NTHF compound.

props.title: Project Costs
props.description: Your support directly funds our ongoing shelter and infrastructure projects for NTHF children.
props.cta: Every contribution, large or small, brings us closer to completing these vital projects.

costs.item: Football field with grass turf & training ground

props.title: Help Us Build Better Spaces
props.content: Your donation helps NTHF expand the dormitory, complete the football field and training ground, and install new playground equipment for our children.

title: Healthcare Access
subtitle: Healing with Compassion: Supporting NTHF Children Through Health Challenges
tagline: Every Child Deserves to Be Healthy
description: Some of our children face serious health challenges that require medical intervention — from minor procedures to major surgeries. NTHF is committed to ensuring no child is left behind due to lack of medical care. We also seek compassionate volunteer nurses to support our dedicated healthcare team.

hero.title: Healthcare for NTHF Children
hero.heading: No Child Left Behind in Health
hero.overlayText: A child healed is a future restored — your support brings medical care to every child who needs it.

props.title: Supporting Children with Health Challenges
props.content: NTHF provides medical support for children in need of both major and minor surgeries, as well as ongoing healthcare. We partner with medical professionals and volunteers to ensure our children receive timely, quality care.

initiatives.title: Surgical Support for Children in Need
initiatives.description: NTHF identifies and supports children requiring major or minor surgeries, covering medical costs and coordinating care with trusted healthcare providers to ensure successful treatment and recovery.

initiatives.title: General Child Health & Wellness
initiatives.description: Routine health check-ups, vaccinations, dental care, and mental health support are provided to all NTHF children to maintain their overall well-being.

props.title: Why Healthcare Matters for Our Children

content.description: Some children arrive at NTHF with untreated medical conditions. Timely surgical intervention can change — and save — their lives.
Regular check-ups and vaccinations protect children from preventable diseases and catch health issues early.
Many of our children have experienced trauma. Psychosocial and mental health support is a core part of their healing journey.

props.title: Support Healthcare for NTHF Children
props.content: Your donation helps NTHF cover surgical costs, medical supplies, and healthcare programmes for our children. If you are a qualified nurse interested in volunteering, please reach out to us.

title: Education & Learning
subtitle: Opening Doors to Knowledge: Equipping NTHF Children for a Brighter Tomorrow
description: Education is the most powerful tool we can give a child. NTHF is expanding its library facilities and supporting children through school, ensuring they have the resources and encouragement they need to succeed academically and beyond.

hero.title: Education at NTHF
hero.heading: Every Child Deserves to Learn and Grow
hero.overlayText: A book in a child's hands today is a career, a dream, a future — built one page at a time.

props.title: Empowering NTHF Children Through Education
props.content: NTHF is expanding its library with additional reading desks to create a better learning environment. We also invite donors and sponsors to directly support the educational journey of our children — from school fees to supplies to higher education.

initiatives.title: Library Expansion — More Reading Desks
initiatives.description: We are adding more reading desks to our library to accommodate more children during study hours. A well-equipped library encourages a love of reading and supports academic achievement.

initiatives.title: Sponsor a Child's Education
initiatives.description: You can make a lasting difference by sponsoring the education of an NTHF child — covering school fees, uniforms, books, and other educational needs. To sponsor the education of any NTHF child, please contact us directly.

initiatives.title: School Supplies & Learning Materials
initiatives.description: NTHF provides notebooks, stationery, uniforms, and other essential school materials to ensure every child is prepared and confident in the classroom.

props.quote: To sponsor the education of any NTHF child, please contact us. Your investment in a child's learning today shapes the leader they will become tomorrow.
focusAreas: Expanding library reading facilities for all children
Sponsoring school fees, uniforms, and learning materials
Supporting children from primary school through higher education
Fostering a culture of reading, curiosity, and lifelong learning

content.description: A well-equipped library with enough reading desks gives every child a quiet, dedicated space to study and discover the joy of reading.
Sponsoring a child's education covers the full cost of their schooling, giving them stability and the chance to focus on learning.
Education is the most reliable path out of poverty. Every child we educate is one step closer to a self-sufficient, fulfilling life.
Academic achievement builds self-esteem and opens doors to opportunities our children may never have imagined.

props.title: Invest in a Child's Future
props.content: To sponsor the education of any NTHF child, please contact us. Your support — whether through a one-time gift or ongoing sponsorship — transforms young lives and builds a stronger tomorrow.

title: Other Needs
subtitle: Many Hands, One Mission: Supporting NTHF's Everyday Needs
tagline: Every Need Met, Every Child Supported
description: Beyond our core programmes, NTHF has a range of ongoing needs that keep our home running and our children cared for. From volunteers to essential supplies, your support in any form makes a meaningful difference in the daily lives of our children.

hero.title: Other Needs
hero.heading: Supporting NTHF's Daily Mission
hero.overlayText: Every contribution — time, skill, or resources — keeps our doors open and our children thriving.

props.title: How Else You Can Help
props.content: NTHF relies on the generosity of individuals, families, and organisations to meet the everyday needs of our children and home. Whether you can give your time, a skill, or a gift, we welcome your support.

content.description: Donations of food, clothing, educational materials, medical supplies, and household goods are always needed and deeply appreciated.
Wheelchairs, hearing aids, and adaptive tools for children with disabilities.
General donations support our operational costs, including utilities, food, transport, and staff welfare — the backbone of everything we do.
We welcome partnerships with businesses and organisations who share our vision. From sponsoring a project to adopting a programme, there are many ways to partner with NTHF.

props.title: Get in Touch
props.content: Have a question, want to volunteer, or need more information about how to support NTHF? We would love to hear from you. Please reach out to us and our team will respond as soon as possible.
